info.name: Stables-HT-HOL-ONLY-time-daily-1-EB-fix5
info.description:
HOL-ONLY fix5: FULL CYCLE (60 days) — DEPOSIT → REDEEM → DEPOSIT
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

KEY UPGRADE from fix4: Extended to 60 days (Mar 1 → Apr 29) to show FULL CYCLE.

SCENARIO ARC:
  Days 1-10:   SAFE → Holder deposits $150K cash into USDC (incremental)
  Days 11-20:  STRESS BUILDS → Peg deviates to 4.2%, risk score hits 48
               ACTUS models fire PP events → USDC redeemed back to cash
  Days 21-35:  PEAK + DECLINE → Continued redemptions, then models stop firing
  Days 36-45:  RECOVERY → Metrics improving, transition from HOLD to SAFE
  Days 46-60:  SAFE AGAIN → Holder deposits cash back into USDC (second cycle)

This demonstrates the COMPLETE bidirectional flow:
  Cash → USDC (deposit when safe)
  USDC → Cash (ACTUS-driven redeem when risky)
  Cash → USDC (re-deposit when safe again)

All configurable via Collection Variables. ZERO CODE CHANGES.
Run with Collection Runner. Open Console (Ctrl+Alt+C).

exec: var pad = function(n) { return n < 10 ? '0' + n : '' + n; };
console.log('HOL-ONLY fix5: FULL CYCLE (60 days) — DEPOSIT \u2192 REDEEM \u2192 DEPOSIT');
console.log('  Days 1-10: Safe \u2192 deposit cash into ' + CFG.stablecoin);
console.log('  Days 11-20: Stress builds \u2192 ACTUS models fire PP, redeem to cash');
console.log('  Days 21-35: Peak stress + decline \u2192 continue redeeming');
console.log('  Days 36-45: Recovery \u2192 transition to safe');
console.log('  Days 46-60: Safe again \u2192 deposit back into ' + CFG.stablecoin);
if (ppPayoff > 0) { cash += ppPayoff; usdc = Math.max(0, usdc - ppPayoff); }
day: dayNum, cash: Math.round(cash), usdc: Math.round(usdc), total: total,
pp: Math.round(ppPayoff), action: holderAction, amt: Math.round(holderAmt),
pegDev: m.pegDev, pegRisk: m.pegRisk, reserves: m.reserves,
liq: Math.round(liq * 1000) / 10, risky: isRisky, safe: isSafe
pm.test('Epoch ' + epoch + ' of ' + NDAYS, function() { pm.expect(epoch).to.be.at.most(NDAYS); });
console.log('Day  Cash        ' + SC + '        Total       Action           Risk');
var maxCash=0, maxUsdc=0, deposits=0, redeems=0, maxPP=0;
var risk = s.risky ? '\u26A0\uFE0F RISKY' : (s.safe ? '\u2705 SAFE' : '\u2796 HOLD');
console.log(String(s.day).padStart(3) + '  ' + c + u + t + act + risk);
if (s.action==='DEPOSIT') { deposits++; if(s.day<=10) phase1Dep++; else phase3Dep++; }
console.log('FINAL: Cash=$' + last.cash + ' ' + SC + '=$' + last.usdc + ' Total=$' + last.total);
console.log('  Max USDC held: $' + maxUsdc + ' | Peak PP redeem: $' + maxPP);
pm.test('Portfolio tracked ' + NDAYS + ' days', function() { pm.expect(history.length).to.eql(NDAYS); });
